'''Arakyd Aerodynes, Inc.''' was manufacturing company that produced [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpacks]]. One of their products was the [[Hush-About AJP-400]] jetpack.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]''
*<!-- 1996-08-XX -->''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''
